records.ety: [L. formidabilis, fr. formidare to fear, dread: cf. F. formidable.]

defs: Exciting fear or apprehension; impressing dread; adapted to excite fear and deter from approach, encounter, or undertaking; alarming.
quotes: They seemed to fear the formodable sight.
I swell my preface into a volume, and make it formidable, when you see so many pages behind.
